listing_body:
Everyday Merrell comfort with a clean minimalist look and grippy map outsole design.

This pair delivers a rugged-casual profile with soft brown nubuck uppers, a low-cut lace-up build, and cushioned interiors that wear easily from weekend errands to travel days. The Black Slate silhouette keeps things versatile enough to pair with denim, chinos, or workwear-inspired fits while still feeling light and flexible underfoot.

You will receive the following:
- 1 pair of Merrell Black Slate lace-up shoes

Estimated measurements are below for quick fit comparison:
- Outsole length (heel-to-toe): ~12.2 in (31.0 cm)
- Outsole width (widest): ~4.4 in (11.2 cm)
- Insole length (heel to toe): ~10.8 in (27.4 cm)
- Insole width (ball area): ~3.9 in (9.9 cm)
- Heel height: ~1.2 in (3.0 cm)
- Weight (pair): ~2.5 lb (1.13 kg)

merrell,black slate,brown shoes,nubuck leather,casual shoe,mens 10.5,us 10.5,uk 10,eu 44.5,gorpcore

Pre-owned with visible wear from regular use, including creasing and scuffing to uppers and notable cracking/chunking along the left heel edge of the outsole; tread remains present and the pair is still wearable as-is.

Grab them now if you want a broken-in Merrell pair with strong daily-use value at a lower entry price.

Estimated retail was about $110; Free shipping: $49.99 | Buyer pays shipping: $34.99

Shipping is estimated around $15.00 via USPS Priority or UPS Ground because this is a standard small shoe box weight class.

Expect a 2 to 6 week sell-through window, mainly driven by the visible heel outsole damage.
